title: Cold Sweat and Aeronautics
description: A patch for compatibility between Coldsweat and Aeronautics.
body:
### English
A temporary patch that helps with heat detection of some blocks in Aeronatic / Sable instances.
### Español
Un parche Provicional que ayuda con la detecion de calor de algunos bloques en las instancias de Aeronautics / Sable.
